heading: Alexandroupoli | Center
subtitle: Data from the Environmental Station of the Technology Club of Thrace
error_message: Measurements could not be retrieved right now.
tv_intro_text: TV Mode - Alexandroupoli Environmental Station | Technology Club of Thrace
tv_mobile_text: TV Mode is designed for televisions and desktop screens. Please use the regular page on mobile devices.
tv_qr_alt: QR code to the home page

descriptions.temperature: Air temperature in degrees Celsius (°C). Thermal comfort also depends on humidity, wind and season.
descriptions.humidity: Relative humidity of the air as a percentage (%). As a guide, 40–60% is often considered a comfortable range.
descriptions.pressure: Atmospheric pressure in hectopascals (hPa). Around 1013 hPa is considered typical pressure at sea level.
descriptions.carbon_monoxide: Carbon monoxide concentration in parts per million (ppm). It should remain very low.
descriptions.carbon_dioxide: Carbon dioxide concentration in parts per million (ppm). Outdoor air is usually close to 420 ppm.
descriptions.pm25: PM2.5 concentration in micrograms per cubic metre (µg/m³). As a guide, a good 24-hour average should not exceed 15 µg/m³.
descriptions.pm10: PM10 concentration in micrograms per cubic metre (µg/m³). As a guide, a good 24-hour average should not exceed 45 µg/m³.
